Medicare FFS Claims (version L) Codebook │ May 2026 │ V 1.15 
152 
DMERC_LINE_FRGN_ADR_IND 
LABEL: 
Line Foreign Address Indicator 
DESCRIPTION: Line Foreign Address Indicator on the durable medical equipment (DME) claim line 
SHORT NAME: DMERC_LINE_FRGN_ADR_IND 
LONG NAME: DMERC_LINE_FRGN_ADR_IND 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
2 
SOURCE: 
NCH 
VALUES: 
EX = Expatriate Beneficiary 
COMMENT: 
This field is used to identify claims for expatriate
